{{Quote|Idealists should not be in this business, you know.|Halla Ettyk on the legal profession|<ref name="krytos" />}}
'''Halla Ettyk''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] and criminal prosecutor from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] who fought against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She survived the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction]] of her homeworld by being off-planet trying to depose a witness. The loss of the peaceful planet helped motivate her to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] soon afterward.

==Biography==
{{Quote|We just have to present to them the best case we can muster, and the defense has to knock it apart. You're not going to start in on me about wanting to make sure your partner's killer really is caught, because I tell you we've got him beyond a reasonable doubt.|Halla Ettyk to Iella Wessiri|<ref name="krytos" />}}
Ettyk rose through [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken's]] [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|intelligence organizations]] to the rank of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]]. Circa [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], Ettyk was working on the recently [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|liberated]] capital planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and took up the offered job of prosecutor on behalf of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Armed Forces]] in the [[Trial of Tycho Celchu|trial]] of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] [[Executive officer/Legends|executive officer]] [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]].<ref name="krytos" />

The commander presented seemingly overwhelming evidence that [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Celchu was guilty of the murder of fellow Rogue [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], and of [[Treason/Legends|treason]] against the new government. The politically-motivated case, which was being used by the government to show they could be as hard on Human criminals as they could on aliens in the face of the [[Krytos virus]], seemed almost impossible for defense attorney [[Flight officer/Legends|Flight officer]] [[Nawara Ven]] to win, even with Ettyk using mostly circumstantial evidence.<ref name="krytos" />

Ettyk, however, dropped the charges when Horn escaped from the Imperial [[Prison/Legends|prison]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' and Cracken revealed his own knowledge of Celchu's innocence.<ref name="krytos" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|She may not have prosecuted any cases over the last seven years, but that's not going to dull her skills.|Nawara Ven on Halla Ettyk|<ref name="krytos" />}}
Despite having not prosecuted a case in seven [[Standard year/Legends|years]], Ettyk proved to be a formidable lawyer. She felt that she could win the case even by using mere circumstantial evidence to prove Celchu's guilt, a testament to her legal skills<ref name="krytos" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Krytos Trap (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
